name: Frankfurter Currency Exchange MCP Server
what_it_does: MCP server wrapping the Frankfurter API — a free currency exchange rate API backed by European Central Bank (ECB) data. Enables AI agents to query current and historical foreign exchange rates for 30+ currencies, convert amounts between currencies, and track rate timeseries for financial calculations.
use_cases: Currency conversion calculations from financial analysis agents
Historical exchange rate lookups for accounting and reporting agents
Multi-currency pricing calculations from e-commerce or billing agents
Forex rate monitoring for international business intelligence agents
not_for: Real-time trading or arbitrage (ECB rates are daily, not tick-by-tick)
Exotic or cryptocurrency pairs (30+ major fiat currencies only)
High-frequency financial operations requiring millisecond accuracy
best_when: An agent needs currency conversion or historical exchange rate data for financial calculations, reporting, or multi-currency support — using free ECB-backed rates without API keys.
avoid_when: You need real-time forex rates for trading decisions or cryptocurrency conversions. Frankfurter provides daily ECB reference rates, not live market rates.

auth.notes: No authentication required. Frankfurter API is completely free and public — no API key needed.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Free — Frankfurter API is open and free (ECB data)
pricing.notes: Frankfurter.app is free open source backed by ECB reference rates. MCP server is free open source. Zero cost to use.

performance.rate_limits: No documented hard limits; reasonable use expected

known_agent_gotchas: FINANCIAL RISK: Currency rates used in financial calculations — validate outputs before business-critical use
ECB rates are daily reference rates — not real-time market rates; 1-day lag on latest rates
Frankfurter.app is community-maintained — no formal SLA; add retry logic for production use
Covers 30+ major fiat currencies (EUR base) — limited for exotic currencies or crypto
agent_readiness.security_notes: FINANCIAL RISK: Currency data used in financial contexts. No auth required — public read-only API. HTTPS. No sensitive data transmitted.

security_score_components.security_notes: Public read-only API. No credentials. HTTPS. Financial context — validate outputs.
